query: France Ebola case 2026: current status of the doctor who tested positive after aid mission, any secondary cases, ECDC reporting. How many confirmed Ebola cases in France as of July 2026?
answer:
I've completed my research on the France Ebola case in 2026. Here's the summary:

## Key Findings

**Confirmed cases in France as of July 2026: ONE (1)**

**Doctor's current status:** The doctor has **fully recovered and was discharged from hospital on July 4, 2026**. French Health Minister Stéphanie Rist confirmed that after two negative PCR tests the patient recovered and returned home. He was "almost asymptomatic" throughout (only headaches).

**The case:**
- A humanitarian physician with the NGO ALIMA who had treated Ebola patients in Ituri Province, DRC
- Flew commercial (Air France) from Kinshasa, arriving June 23, 2026
- Confirmed positive June 24, 2026 — France's **first-ever Ebola case detected on national soil** and the first to test positive outside Africa in this outbreak
- Strain: **Bundibugyo virus** (no approved vaccine)

**Secondary cases: NONE** in France or Europe. Five fellow flight passengers were monitored as precautionary contacts; 107 contacts traced in Kinshasa.

**ECDC reporting:** Issued a preparedness alert (~July 6, 2026), activated continental diagnostic support, and released a preparedness checklist for EU/EEA states. ECDC assessed the risk of sustained EU/EEA transmission as **"very low."**

**Outbreak context:** WHO DON612 (~July 1-2) reported 1,481 total cases / 454 deaths; later reporting (July 7) put it at 1,561 cases / 506 deaths — the third-largest Ebola epidemic on record.

sources.title: Ebola disease caused by Bundibugyo virus, DRC & Uganda (DON612)
sources.snippet: 1481 confirmed cases; 1460 from DRC, 20 from Uganda and one from France (linked to DRC); and 454 deaths.

sources.title: First Ebola patient in France 'recovered' and 'discharged from hospital'
sources.snippet: After two negative PCR tests, the patient is now recovered and has been able to return home safely. Five other Air France passengers identified as possible contacts.

sources.title: France confirms first Ebola case in doctor returning from DR Congo
sources.snippet: Patient in isolation following strict biosafety protocols to prevent risk of spread in France.

sources.title: Europe's First Imported Ebola Case Triggers New Travel Controls and Continent-Wide Preparedness Push
sources.snippet: ECDC released a preparedness checklist; risk of sustained transmission within the EU/EEA remains very low. No secondary cases in Europe.

sources.title: Ebola Strain With No Vaccine Hits 1,561 Cases as ECDC Puts EU on Alert
sources.snippet: 1,561 confirmed cases and 506 deaths; ECDC issued preparedness alert July 6 and activated continental diagnostic support.

sources.title: Ebola response worker who traveled from DRC to France is first in outbreak to test positive outside of Africa
sources.snippet: First reported case in France and first to test positive outside Africa; outbreak driven by rare Bundibugyo strain.

sources.title: France Ebola patient recovers: minister
sources.snippet: The physician 'today left the medical establishment' and returned home, Health Minister Stephanie Rist said.
